name: Fish Grow Eating Fish
description: This adventure game is designed to help you unwind! Dive into the underwater world and strive to become the Ocean King. Begin your journey as a small angelfish and grow by quickly consuming smaller fish. The vast ocean is brimming with surprises, so watch out for larger fish that might bite back. Be patient as you grow stronger, and soon youll be able to take on the bigger fish! Web Dev <a href='https://www.kizi10.org/'>https://www.kizi10.org/</a>
instructions: WASD controll the fish SPACE attack
tags: Action, Android, eating, Fish, HTML5, iPad, iPhone, Kids, Mentolatux, Skill, WebGL
